snippets.title: nf-core/mag style MAG recovery
nf-core/taxprofiler style multi-tool taxonomy
Snakemake QC → taxonomy skeleton
snippets.body:
rule all:
    input: "results/taxonomy_profile.tsv"
rule fastp:
    input: r1="{sample}_R1.fastq.gz", r2="{sample}_R2.fastq.gz"
    output: "qc/{sample}.clean.R1.fastq.gz"
    shell: "fastp -i {input.r1} -I {input.r2} -o {output} ..."
rule kraken2:
    input: rules.fastp.output
    output: "tax/{sample}.kreport"
    shell: "kraken2 --db {params.db} ..."

snippets.title: Viral discovery handoff
